Section 3.1, Creating Cash Order
We corrected the table in Section 3.1 to indicate that in the example for Location D, the cut-off day is âPrevious Monday.â
Section 3.2, Managing Cash Orders, and Section 4.2, Standing Orders
We updated content in S. 3.2 and 4.2 to indicate that Standing Orders in Cash Services can only be deleted, not edited.
Chapter 7, Frequently Asked Questions
We revised the answer to Question 26 to clarify that deposit slips are re-ordered from D+H. If the re-order form is not available, you can contact RBC.
